thaqalaynSanad: Some of our companions, from Muhammad B. al-Husayn, from Uthman B. Isa, from Abdul Rahman B. al-Hajjaj.
thaqalaynMatn: 'Allah, Blessed and Exalted, created Muhammad {{SAW}} and the Progeny of Muhammad {{SAW}} from the clay of Illiyyin, and created their hearts from a clay above that; and He created their Shia from the clay of Illiyyin, and created the hearts of their Shia from a clay above Illiyyin.'
englishText:
14. Abdul Rahman B. al-Hajjaj narrates:

'Allah, Blessed and Exalted, created Muhammad {{SAW}} and the Progeny of Muhammad {{SAW}} from the clay of Illiyyin, and created their hearts from a clay above that; and He created their Shia from the clay of Illiyyin, and created the hearts of their Shia from a clay above Illiyyin.'
arabicText: 14- حَدَّثَنَا بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى خَلَقَ مُحَمَّداً وَ آلَ مُحَمَّدٍ مِنْ طِينَةِ عِلِّيِّينَ وَ خَلَقَ قُلُوبَهُمْ مِنْ طِينَةٍ فَوْقِ ذَلِكَ وَ خَلَقَ شِيعَتَهُمْ مِنْ طِينَةِ عِلِّيِّينَ وَ خَلَقَ قُلُوبَ شِيعَتِهِمْ مِنْ طِينَةٍ فَوْقِ عِلِّيِّينَ.
manual_chain: Some of our companions, from Muhammad B. al-Husayn, from Uthman B. Isa, from Abdul Rahman B. al-Hajjaj.
manual_body:
Abdul Rahman B. al-Hajjaj narrates:

'Allah, Blessed and Exalted, created Muhammad {{SAW}} and the Progeny of Muhammad {{SAW}} from the clay of Illiyyin, and created their hearts from a clay above that; and He created their Shia from the clay of Illiyyin, and created the hearts of their Shia from a clay above Illiyyin.'

chapter: Chapter 9: In It Is the Creation of the Bodies of the Imams and Their Hearts, and the Bodies of the Shias and Their Hearts, Lest Exaggeration Enter the People Regarding the Wonders of Their Knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
thaqalaynSanad: Ibn Isa, from Muhammad al-Barqi, from Salih B. Sahl.
thaqalaynMatn: 'Yes.'
englishText:
15. Salih B. Sahl narrates: I said to Abu Abdullah (al-Sadiq) {{AS}}: 'Is the believer from the clay of the Prophets {{AS}}?' He {{AS}} said:

'Yes.'
arabicText: 15- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَرْقِيِّ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ سَهْلٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع الْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ طِينَةِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ ع قَالَ نَعَمْ.
manual_chain: Ibn Isa, from Muhammad al-Barqi, from Salih B. Sahl.
manual_body:
Salih B. Sahl narrates: I said to Abu Abdullah (al-Sadiq) {{AS}}: 'Is the believer from the clay of the Prophets {{AS}}?' He {{AS}} said:

'Yes.'

chapter: Chapter 9: In It Is the Creation of the Bodies of the Imams and Their Hearts, and the Bodies of the Shias and Their Hearts, Lest Exaggeration Enter the People Regarding the Wonders of Their Knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
thaqalaynSanad: Abdullah B. Muhammad B. Ibrahim B. Muhammad, from Mas'ud B. Yusuf B. Kuleyb, from al-Hasan B. Hammad, from Fuzeyl B. al-Zubeyr.
thaqalaynMatn: 'O Fuzeyl! Do you not know that Rasulullah {{SAW}} said: “We are a Household — we were created from Illiyyin, and our hearts were created from that which we were created from; and our Shia were created from below that, and the hearts of our Shia were created from it. And our enemy — they were created from Sijjin, and their hearts were created from that which they were created from; and their adherents were created from below that, and the hearts of their adherents were created from that which they were created from. So can anyone from the people of Illiyyin become one of the people of Sijjin? And can the people of Sijjin become of the people of Illiyyin?”'
englishText:
16. Fuzeyl B. al-Zubeyr narrates that Abu Ja'far (al-Baqir) {{AS}} said:

'O Fuzeyl! Do you not know that Rasulullah {{SAW}} said: “We are a Household — we were created from Illiyyin, and our hearts were created from that which we were created from; and our Shia were created from below that, and the hearts of our Shia were created from it. And our enemy — they were created from Sijjin, and their hearts were created from that which they were created from; and their adherents were created from below that, and the hearts of their adherents were created from that which they were created from. So can anyone from the people of Illiyyin become one of the people of Sijjin? And can the people of Sijjin become of the people of Illiyyin?”'
arabicText: 16- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مَسْعُودِ بْنِ يُوسُفَ بْنِ كُلَيْبٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ فُضَيْلِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ يَا فُضَيْلُ أَ مَا عَلِمْتَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص قَالَ إِنَّا أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ خُلِقْنَا مِنْ عِلِّيِّينَ وَ خُلِقَ قُلُوبُنَا مِنَ الَّذِي خُلِقْنَا مِنْهُ وَ خُلِقَ شِيعَتُنَا مِنْ أَسْفَلَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ وَ خُلِقَ قُلُوبُ شِيعَتِنَا مِنْهُ وَ إِنَّ عَدُوَّنَا خُلِقُوا مِنْ سِجِّينٍ وَ خُلِقَ قُلُوبُهُمْ مِنَ الَّذِي خُلِقُوا مِنْهُ وَ خُلِقَ شِيعَتُهُمْ مِنْ أَسْفَلَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ وَ خُلِقَ قُلُوبُ شِيعَتِهِمْ مِمَّا خُلِقُوا مِنْهُ فَهَلْ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ عِلِّيِّينَ أَنْ يَكُونَ مِنْ أَهْلِ سِجِّينٍ وَ هَلْ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَهْلُ سِجِّينٍ أَنْ يَكُونُوا مِنْ أَهْلِ عِلِّيِّينَ.
manual_chain: Abdullah B. Muhammad B. Ibrahim B. Muhammad, from Mas'ud B. Yusuf B. Kuleyb, from al-Hasan B. Hammad, from Fuzeyl B. al-Zubeyr.
manual_body:
Fuzeyl B. al-Zubeyr narrates that Abu Ja'far (al-Baqir) {{AS}} said:

'O Fuzeyl! Do you not know that Rasulullah {{SAW}} said: “We are a Household — we were created from Illiyyin, and our hearts were created from that which we were created from; and our Shia were created from below that, and the hearts of our Shia were created from it. And our enemy — they were created from Sijjin, and their hearts were created from that which they were created from; and their adherents were created from below that, and the hearts of their adherents were created from that which they were created from. So can anyone from the people of Illiyyin become one of the people of Sijjin? And can the people of Sijjin become of the people of Illiyyin?”'

chapter: Chapter 9: In It Is the Creation of the Bodies of the Imams and Their Hearts, and the Bodies of the Shias and Their Hearts, Lest Exaggeration Enter the People Regarding the Wonders of Their Knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār

chapter: Chapter 9 (Rare Narrations)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
thaqalaynSanad: Ali B. Hassan, from Ali B. Atiya al-Zayyat, raising it to Ameer al-Mu'mineen (Imam Ali) {{AS}}.
thaqalaynMatn:
'Allah has a river below His Throne, and below the river that is below His Throne is a light from His light; and on the two banks of the river are two created spirits — the Holy Spirit (Ruh al-Qudus) and a spirit from His command. And Allah has ten clays: five from the fragrance of Paradise and five from the earth.' Then he explained the Gardens and explained the earth. Then he {{AS}} said: 'There is no prophet, nor any angel, after its moulding, but that something was breathed into it of the two spirits; and the Prophet {{SAW}} was made from one of the two clays.'

So I said to Abu al-Hasan {{AS}}: 'What is the moulding (al-jabl)?' He {{AS}} said: 'The creation of others besides us, the People of the Household; for Allah created us from all ten clays and breathed into us from both of the two spirits — so the most wholesome of them [our clay] is the purest.'

And another has reported, from Abu al-Samit, who said: 'The clay of the Gardens is Jannat ʿAdn, Jannat al-Ma'wa, al-Naʿim, al-Firdaws, and al-Khuld; and the clay of the earth is Makkah, Medina, Bayt al-Maqdis, and al-Hira.'

arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَسَّانَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ الزَّيَّاتِ يَرْفَعُهُ إِلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع قَالَ قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع إِنَّ لِلَّهِ نَهَراً دُونَ عَرْشِهِ وَ دُونَ النَّهَرِ الَّذِي دُونَ عَرْشِهِ نُورٌ مِنْ نُورِهِ وَ إِنَّ فِي حَافَتَيِ النَّهَرِ رُوحَيْنِ مَخْلُوقَيْنِ رُوحُ الْقُدُسِ وَ رُوحٌ مِنْ أَمْرِهِ وَ إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عَشْرَ طِينَاتٍ خَمْسَةً مِنْ نَفْحِ الْجَنَّةِ وَ خَمْسَةً مِنَ الْأَرْضِ فَفَسَّرَ الْجِنَانَ وَ فَسَّرَ الْأَرْضَ ثُمَّ قَالَ مَا مِنْ نَبِيٍّ وَ لَا مِنْ مَلَكٍ مِنْ بَعْدِ جَبْلِهِ إِلَّا نَفَخَ فِيهِ مِنَ الرُّوحَيْنِ وَ جَعَلَ النَّبِيَّ ص مِنْ إِحْدَى الطِّينَتَيْنِ فَقُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع مَا الْجَبْلُ قَالَ الْخَلْقُ غَيْرُنَا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَنَا مِنَ الْعَشْرِ الطِّينَاتِ جَمِيعاً وَ نَفَخَ فِينَا مِنَ الرُّوحَيْنِ جَمِيعاً فَأَطْيَبُهُمَا [طِينَتُنَا] طِيباً وَ رَوَى غَيْرُهُ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّامِتِ قَالَ طِينُ الْجِنَانِ جَنَّةُ عَدْنٍ وَ جَنَّةُ الْمَأْوَى وَ النَّعِيمُ وَ الْفِرْدَوْسُ وَ الْخُلْدُ وَ طِينُ الْأَرْضِ مَكَّةُ وَ الْمَدِينَةُ وَ بَيْتُ الْمَقْدِسِ وَ الْحِيرَةُ.
